README: README & Research Disclaimer

Last updated: 2026-06-09. Includes complete COA/test data with dates, testing labs, report/task numbers, verification keys, batch/lot information, pass/fail status, certificates, and half-life reference for GitHub hosting.
Short Website Disclaimer

Research Use Disclaimer: This workbook and related website are independent research-tracking resources that aggregate laboratory testing information for informational purposes only. We do not sell, distribute, recommend, endorse, or provide medical advice regarding any compound, product, laboratory, manufacturer, or vendor. We have no affiliation with any testing laboratory, supplier, or seller referenced.
Research Information Only

The information, data, laboratory reports, analyses, summaries, and test results presented in this workbook and related website are provided solely for informational, educational, and research-tracking purposes. This workbook is intended to serve as a repository and tracking resource for laboratory testing information and related research data. Nothing contained here should be interpreted as medical advice, healthcare guidance, pharmaceutical recommendations, treatment recommendations, diagnostic information, or professional advice of any kind. Users should consult qualified healthcare professionals regarding any medical, health, pharmaceutical, or treatment-related decisions.
No Sale or Distribution of Products

This workbook and related website do not manufacture, sell, distribute, market, prescribe, recommend, endorse, or facilitate the purchase of any peptide, pharmaceutical product, drug, dietary supplement, investigational compound, or other regulated substance. The inclusion of any compound, peptide, laboratory report, test result, manufacturer name, vendor name, product reference, or testing reference does not constitute an endorsement, recommendation, approval, certification, or verification of such entity or product.
Independent Research Tracking Platform

This workbook and related website operate solely as independent tracking and information resources. We are not affiliated with, sponsored by, endorsed by, employed by, compensated by, or otherwise connected to any laboratory, testing facility, manufacturer, distributor, vendor, supplier, research organization, or pharmaceutical company. Any names, trademarks, laboratory reports, or testing references appearing here remain the property of their respective owners and are used solely for identification and informational purposes.
Accuracy of Information

While reasonable efforts may be made to maintain accurate and current information, no representation or warranty is made regarding the accuracy, completeness, reliability, timeliness, suitability, or availability of any information presented. Information may contain errors, omissions, outdated content, transcription mistakes, or inaccuracies. Users should independently verify all information before relying upon it.
No Warranties

All information is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, accuracy, reliability, or non-infringement.
Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable federal, state, and local laws, the owners, operators, contributors, and affiliates of this workbook and related website shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, special, exemplary, or punitive damages arising from the use of, reliance upon, or inability to use the information contained here.
Regulatory Compliance

This workbook and related website are intended to comply with applicable United States federal, state, and local laws. The content presented is intended solely for informational and research-recordkeeping purposes and is not intended to promote, market, advertise, or encourage the use of any regulated substance, investigational compound, pharmaceutical product, or medical treatment. Users are solely responsible for understanding and complying with all laws, regulations, and requirements applicable within their jurisdiction.
Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using this workbook or related website, users acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agreed to this disclaimer and accept full responsibility for their use of any information contained herein.
Crimp/Cap Color Tracking
The workbook includes editable crimp color, cap color, and closure notes fields for each COA/test record.
Use these fields to record visual vial/closure identifiers from photos, labels, or COA source documentation.
If the source does not list or show a color, select Unknown or Not Listed rather than guessing.
These fields are for organization and research-tracking only.
